scripts.test: npm run allure:prepare && npx playwright test
scripts.test:ui: npm run allure:prepare && npx playwright test tests/ui
scripts.test:api: npm run allure:prepare && npx playwright test tests/api
scripts.test:sec: npm run allure:prepare && npx playwright test tests/security
scripts.test:sec:report: npm run allure:prepare && npx playwright test tests/security && npm run allure:generate
scripts.test:sec:fuzzing: npm run allure:prepare && npx playwright test tests/security/fuzzing
scripts.test:sec:input-attack: npm run allure:prepare && npx playwright test tests/security/input-attack
scripts.test:sec:ci: npm run allure:prepare && npx playwright test tests/security/ci
scripts.test:sec:regression: npm run allure:prepare && npx playwright test tests/security/ci/security-regression.spec.ts
scripts.test:sec:audit: npm run allure:prepare && npx playwright test tests/security/ci/scan-results-audit.spec.ts
scripts.allure:open: npm run allure:generate && npx allure open allure-report
scripts.report:allure: npm run allure:generate && npx allure open allure-report --port 52331
